message:
✨ Stream benchmark data via SSE and fix Shared Drive traversal (#924)

- Add SSE streaming endpoint (/api/benchmarks/reports/stream) that sends
  report batches as they're fetched from Google Drive, enabling progressive
  card rendering
- Fix Google Drive Shared Drive support (supportsAllDrives=true)
- Fix deep folder traversal (5 levels: experiment → run → results → file)
- Fix file prefix matching (benchmark_report vs benchmark_report_stage_)
- Add isDemoFallback to useCache return type for proper Demo badge display
- Wire isDemoFallback through all 6 benchmark cards replacing useCardDemoState
- Frontend SSE hook with ReadableStream reader for incremental updates

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
